title: Energy and Strength
subtitle: Fueling steady growth
description: As your body continues to support steady growth, your nutritional needs increase further. Focusing on iron, calcium, and sustained energy foods can help maintain your strength and overall well-being.
what_to_expect: Increased nutritional demand to support growth
nutrition_focus: Increase intake of iron and calcium-rich foods
Include foods that provide sustained energy
recommended_foods: Balanced meals like dal, roti, rice, sabzi, and salad
Fruits like banana, apple, orange, guava, and pomegranate
Vegetables including spinach, beetroot, carrots, beans, and broccoli
Protein and calcium sources like milk, curd, paneer, lentils, eggs, or chicken (if preferred)
foods_to_limit: Skipping meals or irregular eating patterns
hydration: Drink water consistently throughout the day
Include fluids like buttermilk, coconut water, or lemon water
reassurance: Balanced and nourishing meals help support your energy and strength.

diabetes.personalized_description: Balanced meals with sustained energy support stable blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Choose complex carbohydrates with protein and fiber
Avoid sudden spikes in food intake
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils and paneer
diabetes.reassurance: Balanced energy intake helps maintain stability.

anemia.personalized_description: Higher focus on iron-rich foods supports improving energy and strength.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Consistent iron intake supports better energy levels.

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced meals with controlled salt intake support stable blood pressure.
nutrition_focus: Keep meals balanced and moderate in salt
hypertension.reassurance: Consistent meals support a calm and balanced routine.

thyroid.personalized_description: A balanced and nutrient-rich diet supports overall metabolic stability.
nutrition_focus: Include a variety of nutrients in meals
thyroid.reassurance: Balanced nutrition supports your body's natural rhythm.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, focusing on iron, calcium, and balanced meals helps maintain strength and stability.
priority_nutrition: Focus on sustained energy and balanced meals
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Nutrient-rich meals support your energy and overall well-being.
